title: TouchscreenFix
description: Fixing the screen going absolutely wild when tapping a finger on your touchscreen by making it actually playable.
body:
# DEVELOPMENT CURRENTLY ON HOLD

I don't have a touchscreen device anymore. Really, that's why I can't work on it anymore. I could probably emulate the behavior, but other things have priority over this for me right now. If you need a specific thing in the mod though, request it on the github through a new issue (link below).

## TouchscreenFix

Fixing minecraft going nuts when tapping a finger on a touchscreen. Very early in development. 

### Not working?

Please make sure you have got the right version for your minecraft version. If you do, please put the crash report (if it crashes) or log in a new issue on the [github](https://github.com/davidsaltacc/touchscreenfix/issues).
